_comment: Jetson Orin Nano Super Cluster Configuration — 3-node cluster with leader election, failover, and AI model allocation

services.name: opencpn
services.description: Chartplotter with NMEA input and route planning

services.name: mcp_server
services.description: MCP server exposing vessel control tools to LLM

services.name: cluster_health
services.description: Health monitoring and leader election loop

services.name: deepstream
services.description: DeepStream video pipeline for 4 USB3 cameras

services.name: deck_safety_monitor
services.description: Analyzes camera feeds for unsafe conditions

usb_peripherals.description: Deck overview, trawl monitor, floodlight IR, stern

services.name: nmea_listener
services.description: NMEA listener daemon for depth/radar serial devices

services.name: depth_processor
services.description: ML bathymetric analysis for bottom type and fish schools

services.name: radar_analyzer
services.description: Radar target analysis for collision avoidance

services.name: engine_telemetry
services.description: CAN bus engine ECU telemetry processor

services.name: esp32_provisioner
services.description: ESP32 provisioning server (primary — engine room proximity)

services.name: grpc_server
services.description: gRPC endpoint for sensor data queries

models.name: radar_analyzer
models.description: CPA/TCPA calculations with small ML classifier

leader_election.description: Redis-based leader election using SET key NX (set-if-not-exists) with PX (expiry) option
election_rules: 1. Current leader renews key every 3 seconds
2. If key expires (5s timeout), all Jetsons race to SET it
3. Lowest IP address wins tie (Alpha 10.0.0.1, Bravo 10.0.0.2, Charlie 10.0.0.3)
4. New leader starts leader-only services (Redis, Mosquitto, NMEA mux, MCP server, Ollama)
5. Old leader stops leader-only services after graceful handover
6. MCP server only runs on leader — prevents conflicting autopilot commands

failover._comment: Failover rules for each Jetson failure scenario

scenarios.name: alpha_fails
scenarios.description: Jetson-Alpha (navigation station) loses power or crashes
scenarios.detection: 5 consecutive ping failures (5s) or Redis key expiry (5s)
scenarios.esp32_provisioner: Charlie takes over (engine room has physical access)
degraded_capabilities: Vision and STT/TTS continue on Bravo
Autopilot ESP32s operate standalone (Iron Mike mode)
LLM voice assistant OFF until Alpha recovers
Chart plotter display OFF (requires Alpha HDMI)
scenarios.recovery: On Alpha reboot, it rejoins cluster as follower. If preferred leader, request leadership transfer.

scenarios.name: bravo_fails
scenarios.description: Jetson-Bravo (back deck) loses power or crashes
scenarios.detection: 5 consecutive ping failures or Redis LWT trigger
scenarios.new_leader: alpha remains leader (no leadership change needed)
degraded_capabilities: No voice assistant (STT/TTS on Bravo only)
scenarios.recovery: On Bravo reboot, restarts vision pipeline. Models reload in ~10 seconds.

scenarios.name: charlie_fails
scenarios.description: Jetson-Charlie (engine room) loses power or crashes
scenarios.detection: 5 consecutive ping failures or Redis LWT trigger
degraded_capabilities: No depth ML analysis (raw depth still via NMEA mux)
No fish ID, no radar analysis
Engine monitor ESP32s operate standalone with local alarms
ESP32 provisioning via Alpha secondary server
scenarios.recovery: On Charlie reboot, reconnects NMEA serial devices, restarts ML models.

scenarios.name: two_jetsons_fail
scenarios.description: Two of three Jetsons fail simultaneously
scenarios.capabilities: Single Jetson provides limited services based on its role. All ESP32s operate standalone with local intelligence.
scenarios.critical_note: Autopilot, engine monitor, and bilge monitor ESP32s all operate independently — no Jetson needed for core safety functions.

scenarios.name: all_jetsons_fail
scenarios.description: All three Jetsons fail or cluster network is severed
scenarios.detection: No Redis PING from any peer + all ESP32s declare LINK_LOST
scenarios.esp32_behavior: All ESP32s enter STANDALONE mode. Last-known settings from NVS.
capabilities_remaining: Autopilot: heading hold via buttons and OLED, PID runs independently
Engine monitor: local alarms for over-temp, low oil pressure
Bilge monitor: autonomous pump control and flood alarm

rsync.git_integration: Config files version-controlled in /opt/vessel/config/ Git repository

database_replication.method: SQLite WAL mode with periodic rsync

whisper.description: 3x real-time on Jetson GPU — 9 seconds of audio processed in 3 seconds

vad.purpose: Voice activity detection — ignores engine noise

piper.alternative_voice: Custom marine voice trained on vessel-appropriate recordings

audio_routing.microphone: Focusrite Scarlett Solo USB audio interface (helm station)
audio_routing.deck_output: 3.5mm to external amplifier for deck speakers (backup on Bravo)

wake_word.description: Wake word detection for hands-free voice control

conversation_loop.description: Full voice conversation: wake word → STT → LLM → TTS → speaker

services_order.name: jetson-boot-init
services_order.description: Mount NVMe, set MAXN power mode, set GPU clocks

services_order.name: network
services_order.description: Configure static IP, verify Ethernet link, start chrony NTP

services_order.name: redis
services_order.description: Start Redis, load persisted state, on Alpha only

services_order.name: mosquitto
services_order.description: Start MQTT broker, load ACL, on Alpha only

services_order.name: nmea_mux
services_order.description: Start NMEA multiplexer daemon, on Alpha leader only

services_order.name: ollama
services_order.description: Start Ollama, load Qwen2.5-7B (~8s), leader only

services_order.name: deepstream
services_order.description: Init DeepStream + YOLOv8n TensorRT, on Bravo only

services_order.name: whisper
services_order.description: Load Whisper-small, init audio, on Bravo only

services_order.name: piper
services_order.description: Load voice model, init ALSA, on Bravo only

services_order.name: fish_id
services_order.description: Load fish species ID TensorRT engine, on Charlie only

services_order.name: depth_processor
services_order.description: Load depth sounder ML model, on Charlie only

services_order.name: esp32_provisioner
services_order.description: Start provisioning server on port 8080, all Jetsons

services_order.name: mcp_server
services_order.description: Start MCP server with vessel control tools, leader only

services_order.name: cluster_health
services_order.description: Start health monitoring, publish status every 5s, participate in election
